results.title: Jamison and Batcheller back Jamie Smith’s mayoral campaign
results.description: For one candidate, his endorsement was about supporting the best person for the job, and also a friend. For another, all of that is true, but he had to cross party lines to do it.

results.title: Several NZers almost gave sensitive information to China, SIS boss says
results.description: Chinese military used an "aggressive online recruitment strategy", pressuring successful candidates to provide sensitive information.
